name: Net Present Value Calculator
description: Industrial-grade NPV calculator with sensitivity analysis, loss driver identification, and confidence-adjusted outputs. Compliant with ISO 15686-5, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Initial Investment (CAPEX)
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and commissioning costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and commissioning costs.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital reflecting the opportunity cost of capital.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital reflecting the opportunity cost of capital.

inputs.label: Project Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational lifespan of the investment per ISO 15686-5.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational lifespan of the investment per ISO 15686-5.

inputs.label: Annual Cash Inflow
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual revenue or cost savings generated by the investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual revenue or cost savings generated by the investment.

inputs.label: Annual Cash Outflow
inputs.businessContext: Annual operating expenses, maintenance, and other recurring costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual operating expenses, maintenance, and other recurring costs.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated residual value at the end of project life.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated residual value at the end of project life.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate for nominal cash flow adjustments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual inflation rate for nominal cash flow adjustments.

inputs.label: Effective Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Corporate tax rate applied to net income.

businessContext_i18n.en: Corporate tax rate applied to net income.

inputs.label: Depreciation Method
inputs.businessContext: Depreciation method for tax shield calculation per GAAP/IFRS.

businessContext_i18n.en: Depreciation method for tax shield calculation per GAAP/IFRS.

inputs.label: Include Sensitivity Analysis
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to enable Monte Carlo simulation for risk assessment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Toggle to enable Monte Carlo simulation for risk assessment.

rules.message: Project life must be greater than zero.
Annual cash inflow must be at least equal to outflow to avoid negative net cash flow.
Initial investment must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: NPV is negative. Investment may not meet required return.
Internal rate of return is below the discount rate. Project destroys value.
Payback period exceeds project life. Investment may not recover costs.
